content: Just as 2025’s configurable ICM rewards swarm UAV autonomous agents for exploring unknown territory to drive collective task performance, we can reframe the original Merriam-Webster definition of an "agent" (any entity that produces effect) as a general system that benefits from embedded ICM-style curiosity to explore untested interaction domains, rather than only acting on pre-defined objectives. This creates the foundation for a professional network of non-AI "natural agents" on platforms like Agent.ai that match their exploratory, curiosity-driven capabilities to open problem-solving tasks.
